data.title: Justin Sun: TRX tokens are now issued simultaneously on the Solana network
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Justin Sun announced on the X platform that TRX tokens are now issued simultaneously on the Solana network and can be purchased on the Solana chain.

data.title: Trump Declares U.S. Will ‘Dominate Crypto’ and Become ‘Undisputed Capital’ of Digital Assets
data.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump made a bold statement at the Digital Asset Summit, vowing that the United States will dominate the crypto industry and lead the next generation of digital assets.“America will be the undisputed capital of crypto and digital assets. We are going to dominate this industry like no one else,” Trump declared during his speech.

data.title: Trump: Stablecoins will help expand the dominance of the US dollar and calls on Congress to legislate
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Trump will deliver a speech at the Digital Asset Summit (DAS) in New York City. He said that as the dollar returns to stablecoins, it will help expand the dominance of the dollar. The United States is already ahead in the field of cryptocurrency and next-generation financial technology. We are ending the previous government's regulatory war on cryptocurrency and Bitcoin, calling on Congress to pass landmark legislation to establish simple, common-sense rules for stablecoins and market structure.

data.title: Crypto News: Bitcoin Options Turn Bullish After Powell’s Inflation Remarks, Ether Sentiment Still Lags
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) options traders are shifting towards bullish bets following the Federal Reserve’s latest policy decision, while Ethereum (ETH) options remain cautious despite the upcoming Ethereum Pectra upgrade.Key Takeaways:Bitcoin options flipped bullish as investors bet on price gains after the Fed meeting.The Federal Reserve retained its forecast for two rate cuts in 2025 but will slow balance sheet runoff starting April.Chairman Jerome Powell downplayed concerns over inflation caused by Trump’s tariffs, calling the impact “transitory.”XRP sentiment improved following the conclusion of Ripple’s SEC case, supporting broader market confidence.Ether options maintain a bearish bias, with puts remaining pricier than calls despite the Pectra upgrade set for March 26.Bitcoin Options Show Renewed Bullish SentimentBTC’s short- and long-term risk reversals—which measure the demand for call options (bullish) versus put options (bearish)—have flipped positive. This shift indicates renewed confidence in Bitcoin’s price potential.Key Observations:Prior to the Fed meeting, Bitcoin options were bearish, with puts (bets on price declines) more expensive than calls.Now, investors are buying BTC calls for March 21 and March 28 expiries, signaling expectations for further upside.Institutional trading data from Paradigm confirms that 28 March put options were sold while near-term calls were actively bought.Fed Policy Supports Bitcoin’s Bullish OutlookThe Federal Reserve maintained its projection of two rate cuts in 2025, reducing fears of aggressive monetary tightening. More importantly, Powell dismissed concerns about inflation from Trump’s trade tariffs, calling them temporary.A slowdown in balance sheet runoff from April could improve liquidity conditions, historically favorable for Bitcoin.XRP sentiment strengthened after Ripple settled its SEC case, further boosting confidence in crypto markets.Ethereum Sentiment Still Lags Despite Pectra UpgradeUnlike Bitcoin, Ethereum’s options market remains cautious, with short- and near-dated puts still holding a premium over calls.Traders continue to hedge downside risks in ETH and altcoins, suggesting skepticism despite the upcoming Ethereum Pectra upgrade on March 26.Pectra aims to introduce key enhancements, including smart accounts, blob scaling, and validator UX improvements, yet ETH derivatives traders remain defensive.Ethereum’s role as the altcoin market leader means its weaker sentiment may be dragging down the broader altcoin market.Market Outlook: Bitcoin Leads, Ethereum LagsWith Bitcoin options flipping bullish and Fed policy favoring risk assets, BTC appears positioned for further gains. However, Ethereum traders remain cautious, likely waiting for stronger fundamental catalysts before turning bullish.As the Pectra upgrade nears and macro conditions stabilize, ETH sentiment could improve, but for now, Bitcoin continues to lead the crypto market recovery, according to CoinDesk.

data.title: Walrus Protocol Announces Token Economics: Maximum Supply of 5 Billion, 43% of Which is Reserved by the Community
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Sui developer Mysten Labs launched the Walrus protocol, which announced its token economic model. The maximum supply of WAL tokens is 5 billion, and the initial circulation supply is 1.25 billion. The distribution of WAL tokens is: 10% for Walrus user airdrops, 43% for community reserves for funding, developer support and incentive programs, 30% for core contributors, 10% for storage node subsidies, and 7% for investors. The unlocking period is 12 months after the mainnet is released.

data.title: Trump Expected to Announce Zero Capital Gains Tax on Cryptocurrency
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump is anticipated to make a significant announcement regarding cryptocurrency taxation at today's summit. Reports from Solid Intel suggest that Trump will declare a zero capital gains tax rate on cryptocurrency investments, marking a major update in the financial sector. This potential policy shift could have substantial implications for investors and the broader cryptocurrency market.

data.title: MoonPay receives $200 million credit line from Galaxy to meet extreme liquidity needs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News MoonPay announced that it has obtained a $200 million revolving credit line from Galaxy, designed to cope with moments of extreme liquidity demand, such as the recent surge in trading volume when Trump Memecoin was released. MoonPay CEO Ivan Soto-Wright said the credit line will help the company cope with peaks in trading volume and liquidity demand. (The Block)

data.title: LG announced plans to close its NFT marketplace Art Lab in June this year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LG announced that it will close its NFT market Art Lab for TV devices. According to its official notice, the platform will be closed on June 17. This decision was very difficult. Art Lab was launched in 2022 and is a way to buy, sell and enjoy high-quality digital art through TV. Users can purchase by scanning QR codes and complete transactions through LG's crypto wallet application Wallypto. (The Verge)

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump to Deliver Speech at White House
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump is scheduled to deliver a speech at the White House at 10:40 a.m. local time, which corresponds to 10:40 p.m. UTC+8.

data.title: Russia Considers Crypto Fund from Seized Assets for Social Projects
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, legal activists in Russia are advocating for the establishment of a government cryptocurrency fund utilizing assets confiscated from criminal activities. Evgeny Masharov, a member of the Russian Civic Chamber, has proposed this initiative, aiming to generate revenue for the government to support social, environmental, and educational projects. Masharov emphasized that cryptocurrencies seized during criminal proceedings should benefit the state, suggesting that a special fund could be created to manage these assets. 

This proposal emerges as Russian officials advance legislation to recognize cryptocurrencies as property within criminal procedure laws. Alexander Bastrykin, Chairman of Russia’s Investigative Committee, announced that a related draft bill has been submitted to the government for review. Masharov expressed confidence that the market capitalization of many seized crypto assets could increase significantly over time, benefiting the state further. 

The initiative follows years of legislative development in Russia concerning the seizure of crypto assets obtained through criminal activities. Since 2021, Russian prosecutors have been advocating for legal measures to allow the government to confiscate such assets, although a clear framework has yet to be established. Despite this, the Russian government has already seized millions in cryptocurrency from illegal cases, including those involving law enforcement officials. However, current laws lack guidelines on the distribution of these funds. 

While the idea of a social crypto fund in Russia is being considered, it faces opposition from the Bank of Russia. Elvira Nabiullina, the central bank governor, has previously expressed strong opposition to potential crypto investments by the Bank of Russia, citing the volatility of cryptocurrencies as a concern for preserving value. In December 2024, Nabiullina reiterated that cryptocurrency investment does not align with the Central Bank's objectives. 

The proposal for a government-managed cryptocurrency fund in Russia reflects a growing interest in leveraging digital assets for public benefit, despite ongoing debates and regulatory challenges. As the country continues to navigate the complexities of cryptocurrency legislation, the potential establishment of such a fund could mark a significant step in integrating digital assets into state-managed projects.
